name: Single filer at high income (MXN 1,000,000/year)
description: Employee earning MXN 1,000,000 annually (~MXN 83,333/month, approximately USD 48,800). High earner in the 30% marginal bracket.

sources.description: Calculated using 2026 ISR annual table. ISR bracket: 30% on excess above MXN 668,840.15. IMSS still below cap.
